  "findings": [
    "Shaft alignment was completed before final piping connections were made, introducing severe pipe strain."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Disconnect piping, perform a pipe strain check, and realign the shaft with the piping connected in accordance with API 686."
  ],
  "rationale": "API 686 requires that final shaft alignment checks be performed after piping is connected to ensure that pipe strain does not pull the machinery out of alignment, which can cause premature bearing and seal failure.",
  "references": [
    "API 686 Chapter 6",
    "Laser alignment system manuals"
  ]
}
